description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-20.04 to test multiple Python versions, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies, running mypy tests for specific Python versions, executing tests with coverage, and uploading coverage data to Coveralls. A second job waits for the test job to finish and finalizes the Coveralls report.
